name: Nostalgic Slideshow
description: Slow slideshow of British scenes from the past with emotional caption and text-to-speech voiceover.

name: Honest Product Review
description: Creator shows product, gives simple honest opinion, asks audience if they would buy.
hook_template: I’ve had this {product} for a week and I need to be honest...
caption_template: Would you buy this {product}? Let me know below. {cta}

name: Hidden Fact Bomb
description: Short video revealing a surprising British fact that most people don’t know.
hook_template: They never taught us this in school...

name: Patriotic Unboxing
description: Unboxing a British-themed product with pride and emotional reaction.
hook_template: This just arrived and I had to share it with you...
caption_template: This {product} is exactly what I needed. {cta}

name: Community Voice
description: Quotes or comments from the audience remixed into a video with a call to action.
hook_template: Your comments keep proving we’re not alone...
caption_template: Tag someone who needs to see this. {cta}
